message:
feat(hybrid): implement runtime Q4K→Q2K transcoding with CSR corrections

Add hybrid inference mode that transcodes Q4K weights to Q2K on-the-fly
during expert loading, with CSR delta corrections to restore Q4K quality.

Key changes:
- Fix NaN bug: use HybridMixed kernel (Q2K gate/up + Q4K down) for transcoding
- Add isTranscodingEnabled() and isTranscodingMode() to vtable
- Add pretranscodeVIPExperts() for startup optimization of VIP experts (0,4)
- Add transcodeQ4KtoQ2K() CPU-based conversion in expert_cache.zig
- Add delta_outlier_analyzer.zig for generating CSR correction files
- Add quantize.zig with Q2K quantization support
- Disable debug logging that caused excessive GPU syncs

Memory savings: ~42% for gate/up tensors (Q4K 144B → Q2K 84B per block)
VIP cache hits: 100% for pre-transcoded experts
